questions.prompt: A student reviewing World Languages Checkpoint B: Community Connections needs to show the skill "interpret authentic media." Which action best fits that skill?
questions.correctText: Use evidence to explain travel.
choices: describing a topic without explaining why it matters
Ignore the context and pick the longest answer.
Use evidence to explain travel.
using a rule from a different unit
questions.explanation: The useful move is to connect evidence to travel; this matches the standards/CED emphasis on reasoning and application.

Connect real-world task to the prompt context before choosing.
